axioms.name: Re-entry primacy
axioms.statement: Interpretation, learning, and inference are temporal phase differences of the same DeltaPhi re-entry process.

axioms.name: Boundary formation
axioms.statement: Persistent mismatch between expected transition DeltaPhi_hat and actual transition DeltaPhi stabilizes a boundary.

axioms.name: Self as folded boundary
axioms.statement: A self is the recursively stabilized boundary where world-resistance and other-resistance fold into internal constraints.

axioms.name: Consciousness as monitoring with write-back
axioms.statement: Consciousness is boundary-displacement monitoring whose signal re-enters the next transition selection.
